items.title: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
items.summary: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".

items.title: Status quo at Jerusalem's holiest site under threat as Israeli nationalists flout rules
items.summary: Israeli nationalists are increasingly flouting a convention on how faiths share the al-Aqsa mosque compound.

items.title: 'They came with machetes' - deadline looms for migrants to leave South Africa
items.summary: Protesters have set 30 June as the date for all undocumented migrants to leave the country.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 俄控無人機襲擊白俄巴士釀1死8傷 烏克蘭否認
